title: Quamoclit longiflora

This family consists of over 1,600 species of flowering plants, including both annuals and perennials. Quamoclit longiflora is a type of flowering vine native to tropical Africa. It is also known as the "queen's wreath" due to its attractive and intricate blooms. The plant's classification is further supported by its similarities in morphology and genetics with other Convolvulaceae species.
